summary: Round 2 (review fix, D4->B): REV-002 FIXED via targeted ship-reap. Added Sweeper.Only []string + matchesOnly()/inScope() (sweep.go) restricting the scan + lock/registry cleanup to named slugs; cmdSweep parses `gogo sweep [<slug>...]` (validSlug-guarded, sweepHelp updated); /gogo:done reap step now runs targeted `gogo sweep <member-slug>...`. Plain `gogo sweep` stays manual whole-board. REV-001 accepted (wontfix, WAD) + documented in cli-contract 0.17.0 self-guard note. New TestSweepTargetedOnlyNamedSlug green; whole-board TestSweepReapsOrphansAndTerminal + TestSweepSparesSelf + TestSkillsBashNoUnsafeRm green; gofmt/vet clean, go test -race ./... green; version stays 0.17.0. As-built charts (flow/class) + manifest refreshed. 0 open review issues.
